description: Select rblocks for interactive highlighting or subsequent operations.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock select ...') via command interface

keywords.name: adummy
keywords.description: If a boolean type is specified, then if on it selects all rigid blocks in the range. If off it de-selects all rigid blocks in the range. on is the default if no keyword is given.

keywords.name: new
keywords.description: Implies on . This will select rigid blocks in the range, and automatically de-select rigid blocks not in the range.

keywords.name: undo
keywords.description: This will reverse the operation of the last rblock select command. A maximum undo stack of size 12 is retained.
